text: Experts predict that Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) – a type of AI that can perform any intellectual task a human can – could arrive within the next few decades. This technology could bring huge benefits, such as solving complex problems in medicine and climate change. However, there are also serious risks to consider. AGI might be misused or act in ways we cannot predict. Many researchers believe we need to develop safety measures now. While no one knows the exact timeline, it's clear that the future of AI will shape our lives in both wonderful and challenging ways.
